evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 40929576. 2025/12/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: HIV self-testing (HIVST) has been rapidly scaled up and additional 
strategies further expand testing uptake. Secondary distribution involves people 
(defined as "indexes") applying for multiple kits and subsequently sharing them 
with people (defined as "alters") in their social networks. However, identifying 
key influencers is difficult.
